description: Unique identifier for the crash record
Date and time of the crash
Posted speed limit at crash location in mph
Traffic control device present at crash location
Weather conditions at time of crash
Lighting conditions at time of crash
Type of road defect if any
Indicator if crash occurred on private property
Indicator if crash is a hit-and-run
Damage level or estimated damage amount
Date and time police were notified
Indicator if crash occurred in work zone
Number of units involved in crash
Number of injuries reported but not evident
Number of injuries with no indication
